title: Hand Tracking and Drawing Engine
delivery: Velocity-aware stabilized fingertip mapping with bounded prediction for lower perceived latency.
Camera ink avoids applying the full smoothing setting twice, preserving smoothness without rubber-band lag.
Pinch hysteresis still requires safe geometry and stable frames before beginning a stroke.
Bounded continuity holds an active stroke through short closed-fist, occlusion, or detector-drop events without adding unsafe points.
Closed-fist guide feedback remains visible for 560 ms and camera-hand eraser remains aligned to calibrated coordinates.
